name: brana
description: AI development system — skills, agents, and hooks for systematic software engineering with Claude Code. Enforces spec-first, test-first workflows with cross-session memory and learning.
features: 24 slash commands for development, quality, business, and integrations
10 lifecycle hooks (session start/end, spec-first gate, auto-challenge)
11 specialized agents (memory, challenger, PR reviewer, daily ops)
Cross-session memory with semantic search (ruflo integration)
Spec-first enforcement on feat/* branches with docs/decisions/
Flywheel metrics: correction rate, test write rate, cascade rate
Venture OS: weekly review, pipeline, financial model, growth experiments
Identity layer: CLAUDE.md, behavioral rules, helper scripts
